article_title: Xiaomi Unmasked as Creator of Mystery Hunter Alpha AI Model After Week of DeepSeek Speculation

content_preview.title: Xiaomi Unmasked as Creator of Mystery Hunter Alpha AI Model After Week of DeepSeek Speculation
content_preview.summary: An anonymous trillion-parameter AI model that topped OpenRouter usage charts and triggered widespread speculation about a stealth DeepSeek V4 launch turned out to be Xiaomi's MiMo-V2-Pro, signaling the smartphone and EV maker's escalating ambitions in the AI model race.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## The Mystery Appears

On March 11, an anonymous AI model appeared on the developer platform OpenRouter under the codename Hunter Alpha. It carried no developer attribution, and OpenRouter itself labeled it a stealth model. Its listed specifications were striking: one trillion parameters and a context window of up to one million tokens. Within days, the model had surpassed one trillion tokens in total usage and climbed to the top of OpenRouter's leaderboard, according to [The Japan Times](https...

recommendations: 2 source(s) blocked bot access — sources likely valid but not archivable automatically

editor_notes.content_quality: Engaging narrative structure that follows the mystery-to-reveal arc. Good technical detail on model specs and pricing, with strong strategic context about Xiaomi's AI ambitions and the broader Chinese AI landscape.
editor_notes.source_verification: SCMP (fetched): Confirms Luo Fuli from DeepSeek joining Xiaomi, Q3 2025 profitability for smart EV/AI/new initiatives segment, 29B yuan revenue (199% YoY), Lu Weibing on AI returns exceeding expectations, MiMo launch April 2025. Japan Times (403 blocked): Reputable publication, primary source for Hunter Alpha/OpenRouter details, DeepSeek speculation, pricing — cannot independently verify but Japan Times is a reliable source. Bloomberg (403 blocked/paywalled): Reputable financial publication, primary source for share price data and Lei Jun investment figures — cannot independently verify but Bloomberg is among the most trusted financial news sources.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: SCMP-sourced claims all verified. Japan Times and Bloomberg claims are internally consistent and plausible. The narrative is coherent with known Xiaomi strategy and Chinese AI landscape developments.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. The 'mystery' framing is engaging without being sensationalist. Good analytical closing paragraph.
editor_notes.originality: No prior coverage of Hunter Alpha or MiMo-V2-Pro. Previous Xiaomi article covered humanoid robots on EV assembly lines — different topic.
concerns: 2 of 3 sources returned 403. The verifiable claims (SCMP) all check out, and Japan Times + Bloomberg are highly reputable publications. Accepting with acknowledgment of partial verification.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Well-crafted AI industry news with good narrative structure. Partially verified due to source access restrictions, but the verifiable portion confirms accuracy and the blocked sources (Japan Times, Bloomberg) are highly reputable. Approved for publication.
